/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -o cpp_underwriter.cpython-311-darwin.so CMakeFiles/cpp_underwriter.dir/src/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_underwriter.dir/src/RiskEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_underwriter.dir/src/ExcelExporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_underwriter.dir/src/ActuarialMath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_underwriter.dir/src/FactorModel.cpp.o  output/libOpenXLSX.a
